yoy_growth.assessment: Strong year-over-year improvement across all metrics. The site has been actively worked on and is trending upward significantly.

top_performing_pages.notes: Homepage is top traffic driver but CTR at 1.4% for position 12.6 is expected; needs position improvement to unlock more clicks
Second-highest traffic page — informational content performing well; ranking for multiple cost/installation queries
Position 3 average but only 0.8% CTR — very low for a position 3 ranking; title/meta description may not match search intent well, or SERP features are suppressing clicks
CRITICAL UNDERPERFORMER — 7,716 impressions but only 25 clicks (0.3% CTR) at position 28.3. The product category page is not ranking competitively. Needs significant SEO improvement.

top_queries.opportunity: Position 11 means page 2 — moving to top 10 could 3-4x clicks
0.3% CTR at position 10.4 is poor — title/meta not compelling enough for this broad commercial term

top_queries.note: Site ranking well for whirlybird topics despite it not being core service

ctr_opportunities.description: Keywords with high impressions, position under 15, but low CTR — quick wins if titles/meta updated

items.action: Improve to top 10 — critical primary keyword
CTR extremely low at position 10 — update meta description to improve click-through
Position 8 with only 0.9% CTR — dedicated /skylight-installation-melbourne/ page needed
Strengthen /brand/velux/ page to push into top 5
Dedicated Velux fixed skylights page would capture this
Position 6.5 with only 0.9% CTR — near-me intent page with location signals needed

blog_posts.assessment: Blog content is performing strongly for informational and cost queries. The whirlybird content at position 3 with 28k impressions represents a major traffic capture. More blog content around cost/price queries would continue this momentum.

product_pages.assessment: Product pages drive significant individual clicks but most have low impressions. The product catalogue is strong but needs better internal linking and schema.

gaps: No dedicated /skylight-replacement/ page — 404 on this URL
No dedicated page for 'skylight repair melbourne'
No dedicated page for 'flat roof skylights melbourne'
No dedicated page for 'solar skylights melbourne'

location_pages.count: multiple (local sitemap + suburb pages in page sitemap)
location_pages.assessment: Suburb-level location pages exist — good for local SEO. The Mornington page ranks position 2 for 'skylights mornington' (50 sv). Strategy is working for local suburb targeting.

content_gaps.evidence: Site ranking pos 12 for 'skylight repair melbourne' but no dedicated page. Competitor australianskylights.com.au owns pos 1.
/skylight-replacement/ returns 404. Current content at /supply-and-repairs-in-melbourne/ has a URL mismatch with intent.

content_gaps.gap: Velux skylight installation guide / process page
content_gaps.evidence: For 'velux skylight installation' the SERP is dominated by YouTube/DIY content. A professional service page explaining the installation process could rank for long-tail queries.

content_gaps.gap: Tiled roof and metal roof skylight pages
content_gaps.evidence: Tracked keywords 'tiled roof skylights' and 'metal roof skylights' — site not in top 50. These have local installation context. Dedicated pages could target these.
Solar skylight keywords (solar skylight 484 SV pos 19.5, solar skylights 481 SV pos 18.5) — significant impressions, poor position. No dedicated page.
Velux FCM flat roof range exists in product catalogue but no dedicated service/category page for flat roof installations.

device_performance.analysis: Site ranks significantly better on mobile (avg pos 8.0) vs desktop (avg pos 15.5). This 7.5 position gap is unusual and notable. Mobile ranking is strong — desktop ranking needs work.

international_noise.note: International traffic from USA, NZ, UK, PHL, IND likely from people searching product specs globally — not service prospects

content_strengths: Strong YoY growth: clicks up 71%, position improved from 32.5 to 12.0
Blog content performing well — cost/price queries capturing high-intent traffic
Product catalogue of 121 products driving long-tail traffic
Suburb location pages working — Mornington at position 2
critical_issues: /skylight-products/ getting 7,716 impressions at pos 28.3 with only 0.3% CTR — biggest underperformer by impression volume
Whirlybird content at pos 3 generating 0.8% CTR — SERP feature likely capturing clicks
6 content gaps identified for high-priority service pages
quick_wins: Update meta descriptions on /brand/velux/ and /skylight-products/ to improve CTR
Create /skylight-replacement/ page (404 currently) targeting 'skylight replacement melbourne'
Improve /skylight-products/ on-page SEO to push from pos 28 toward pos 10
